tasks.title: Implement src/server/quota-prober.ts
tasks.description:
NEW: probeQuota(), cache logic, tmux scraping, timeout handling, per-model cooldown tracking

REVIEW FAIL (code): Lint and Spec Mismatch — FR-002.
  WHERE: src/server/quota-prober.ts
  EXPECTED: No lint errors; return probeStatus instead of status; parse resetsIn.
  ACTUAL: 3 lint errors (noAsyncPromiseExecutor, noUselessSwitchCase, useOptionalChain); returns status; hardcoded resetsIn.
  FIX: Fix lint errors (refactor Promise to remove async executor); rename status to probeStatus; attempt to parse resetsIn from scrape output.
  GATE: gates/T006-gate.sh assertion #2
  REF: plan.md Phase 2 > src/server/quota-prober.ts
